description: I have great aptitude for creating sophisticated and seamless digital experiences, and I am skilled in a wide range of programming languages and technologies.

services.webDevelopmentDesc: I create and optimize websites and web applications, ensuring performance, responsiveness, and modern technologies for a flawless user experience.
services.uxUiDesignDesc: I design and implement robust server-side architectures, APIs, and databases, ensuring scalability, security, and high performance for modern applications.
services.devOpsDesc: I improve development workflows with automation, CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and scalable solutions to enhance efficiency and reliability.
services.apiDevelopmentDesc: I build high-performance mobile applications for iOS and Android, delivering seamless user experiences with modern frameworks and native capabilities.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Software Engineer with more than 3 years of experience in Technology, focused on developing and optimizing robust and responsive solutions, in addition to continuous process improvement. Development of frontend and backend projects, integrations with APIs, containerization and version control systems. I am passionate about creating user-friendly interfaces and have a keen eye for design. I am always looking to learn new technologies and improve my skills.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description:
I have over three years of experience developing web and mobile applications, working on projects ranging from small business websites to large-scale platforms. With a strong background in frontend and backend technologies, my expertise extends to DevOps, where I have worked with Docker, AWS services (EC2, Lambda), and CI/CD pipelines to ensure scalable and efficient deployments.

I have collaborated with clients from various industries, including e-commerce and SaaS platforms, delivering high-quality solutions tailored to their needs.

My ability to adapt to new technologies quickly and my experience in UX/UI design allow me to create seamless and intuitive user experiences.

education.title: Education
education.description: I hold a degree in Control and Automation Engineering from the Federal University of Mato Grosso. I graduated in 2021 and have been working as a software developer ever since. I am always looking to learn new things and improve my skills.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.description: I have experience working with a variety of technologies, including React, Redux, Node.js, and MongoDB. I am comfortable working with both front-end and back-end technologies and have experience building web applications from scratch. I am always looking to learn new technologies and improve my skills.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Let's partner up and make things happen. If you have a project that you would like to discuss, please feel free to reach out to me.

projects.title: CoolHunting
projects.description: Trend monitoring platform with automated data crawling, developed for WAP. Full web dashboard with analysis and visualization of automatically collected information.

projects.title: ConectHunt
projects.description: Mobile app for trend management at technology innovation fairs around the world. Built with React Native and Expo, featuring a fluid interface powered by Reanimated and NativeWind.

projects.title: Movart Express
projects.description: Web platform developed for Movart using a BFF (Backend for Frontend) architecture, Supabase integration, and a modern interface built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: SaaS Automa
projects.description: SaaS developed during my time at Automa for performance analysis and goal management of renewable energy sources. Features operational indicators and availability reports for photovoltaic, wind, and small hydroelectric power plants.

projects.title: goSHOP E-Commerce
projects.description: An e-commerce platform built with modern technologies to create a functional and responsive web application.

projects.title: Ink and Ideas Blog
projects.description: A blog application built with Next.js, styled with Tailwind CSS, and tested using Jest. It provides a modern and responsive platform for reading and sharing blog posts.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: My personal portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills.

projects.title: Dashboard Next
projects.description: A dashboard application developed with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Vercel, and Chart.js, allowing dynamic and interactive data visualization.

projects.title: SaborSocial Platform
projects.description: A platform that bridges NGOs, restaurants, and events with surplus food to individuals in need, actively combating food waste. Awarded second place at the Unicamp Hackathon, highlighting innovative solutions and exceptional teamwork.

projects.title: Tickets API
projects.description: Ticket API developed using Node.js and Express, designed to manage the creation, updating, and retrieval of tickets. Implements full CRUD functionality.
